channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Shoe rack flytipped, 29th March
item.description:
Small shoerack left next to the fencing by the railway bridge on Bycroft Street SE20 - this is becoming quite a regular flytipping spot, sadly.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bycroft Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish outside Eglinton Hill Bird Sanctuary, 29th March
item.description:
There's some rubbish on the pavement in Eglinton Hill opposite the end of Dallin Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eglinton Hill, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip and overflowing bin Cavendish Road, 29th March
item.description:
Flytip of many bags of rubbish outside number 298 Cavendish Road and overflowing bin at corner of cavendish and Sistova

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 300, Cavendish Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another Mattress on street, 29th March
item.description:
Second mattress on Norcott Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Norcott Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Abandoned roadworks comes, 29th March
item.description:
These cones have been left behind after work to remove a damaged tree

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bushberry Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Lights not working, 29th March
item.description:
The lollipop street light and all the stair lights between Marine Drive and Mulgrave Road are not working
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marine Drive, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping Barry Road to be cleared asap, 29th March
item.description:
Bags outside council estate, chair on path (blocking it) and plastic box all flytipped and to be cleared asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 64, Barry Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on the corner of 88 Trafalgar Road, corner with Maze Hill, 29th March
item.description:
Great if you can paint over this. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Trafalgar Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on the bike/bin store on Tom Smith Close, 29th March
item.description:
For the second time in less than a week this has been graffitied. Great if you can remove again. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Maze Hill, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping, 29th March
